name: LXP Industrial Trust 6.5% Series C Cumulative Convertible Preferred Stock
summary: LXP Industrial Trust 6.5% Series C Cumulative Convertible Preferred Stock is a series of preferred stock issued by LXP Industrial Trust, a real estate investment trust (REIT). The preferred stock pays a cumulative dividend and may be converted into shares of LXP Industrial Trust's common stock under certain conditions. Details such as the conversion ratio and redemption provisions are outlined in the stock's offering documents.
